meta.note: ID-level override-eligibility manifest. Reproducible from sdk/schema/functions.json + the baked policy; NO addresses. tick_isr_reachable is conservatively true for all eligible (the engine call graph is one dense SCC — 1020/1109 typed functions are tick-reachable). The per-build address descriptor (which are present + where) is build/override_gen.c.
